Avinash Anand
Derivative & Crypto Trader
Kolkata, India
// 01 — Who I Am

Introduction

Trader by craft.
Analyst by nature.

I'm Avinash Anand, a results-driven crypto & derivatives trader based in Kolkata, India, with 5+ years of hands-on experience across arbitrage, options strategies, volatility analysis, and institutional risk management.

Currently at Teesta Investment Pvt Ltd, I execute cross-exchange and intra-exchange crypto arbitrage — scanning multi-venue liquidity, funding rates, and order book depth in real time. Before that, three years at Mansukh Securities & Finance running options and volatility desks.

I hold the EPAT certification from QuantInsti in Algorithmic Trading and practise AI-assisted development — using Codex, Claude, and Cursor to build trading prototypes and automate research at speed. I call it vibe coding.

My edge: deep market intuition + quantitative foundations + ability to ship ideas fast via AI tooling. Suited for prop desks, hedge funds, and HFT crypto firms.

" Words have a magical power — and so does a well-timed trade. "

// 02 — Learning Path

Education

Flagship Certification
Executive Programme in Algorithmic Trading (EPAT)
QuantInsti — Global Algo Trading Institute
Apr 2023 — Jan 2024
Comprehensive 6-month programme. Covered Python for trading, ML basics, statistical modelling, financial computing, and execution algorithm design. One of the most respected certifications in systematic trading.
Advanced Course
Advanced Option Trading
Kredent Academy
Completed
Rigorous derivatives training specialising in multi-leg option strategies, volatility-based models, risk-reward optimisation, and practical market execution aligned with institutional trading environments.
Degree
BBA — Financial Marketing
Doon Business School, Dehradun
2016 — 2019
Bachelor of Business Administration with a focus on financial marketing. Built the foundational understanding of business, finance, and market dynamics that underpins trading decisions.
Regulatory Cert
NISM Series VIII — Equity Derivatives
National Institute of Securities Markets (SEBI)
Certified
SEBI-mandated certification for equity derivatives. Covers futures and options market structure, pricing, regulations, settlement, and risk management in Indian markets.
Vocational
Python for Trading
Vocational Programme
Completed
Applied Python scripting for financial data handling, automation, and trading analytics. Bridges the gap between technical analysis and programmatic execution.
Self-Directed
AI & Trading Automation — Vibe Coding
Ongoing Self-Development
2023 — Ongoing
Mastery in using LLMs and AI agents (Claude, Codex, Cursor) to build trading prototypes, backtest helpers, and research automation scripts rapidly. Also includes cloud computing basics.
// 03 — Career

Work Experience

Sep 2023 — Present
Full-time · Active
Associate Trader — Crypto Arbitrage & Derivatives
Teesta Investment Pvt Ltd · Kolkata, India
  • Execute cross-exchange and intra-exchange crypto arbitrage, capturing price inefficiencies with disciplined risk controls
  • Monitor multi-venue liquidity, funding rates, depth changes, and spreads to identify real-time opportunities
  • Maintain detailed trade journals, PnL logs, and risk metrics for internal review and optimisation
  • Utilise data analysis frameworks to evaluate trade efficiency and improve execution consistency
  • Operate in high-pressure environments requiring fast, accurate decision-making under volatile conditions
Fast ExecutionMarket ScanningRisk DisciplineCrypto Microstructure
Jul 2020 — Aug 2023
Full-time · 3 yrs
Derivative Trader — Options & Volatility Strategies
Mansukh Securities & Finance
  • Executed systematic options strategies including calendar spreads, volatility plays, and directional structures
  • Analysed market data, OI shifts, volatility surfaces, and event-driven setups to optimise trades
  • Active in portfolio review, position sizing, and exposure management across equity derivatives
  • Mentored junior traders on strategy frameworks and desk operations
  • Supported senior strategy development and contributed to desk-wide research initiatives
Options GreeksVol Surface AnalysisPortfolio ManagementMentorship
Nov 2019 — Jun 2020
Trainee · 8 mos
Derivative Trainee — Market Foundations
Mansukh Securities & Finance
  • Learned derivatives market structure, order mechanics, compliance frameworks, and risk controls
  • Underwent structured training in futures and options, spreads, and execution methodologies
  • Built foundational desk skills in trade operations and real-time market monitoring

I believe markets are mirrors of human psychology — understanding trader behaviour, crowd dynamics, and sentiment cycles is as important as price charts and quant models. This drives my fascination with trading psychology as both a study and a daily practice.
